human.name: Human
human.history: The most common people of Talania. Obsessed with carving their own destiny after feeling abandoned by the Gods. Their cities are divided between technology and faith.
human.debuff_desc: Humans take slightly more damage from magical attacks.

high_elf.name: High Elf
high_elf.history: Graceful beings tied to Arcanis. Long-lived, they dwell in deep forests or among floating sky isles.
high_elf.buff_desc: High Elves gain increased maximum mana.
high_elf.debuff_desc: High Elves have lower maximum health.

orc.name: Orc
orc.history: Warriors of Gor'thul who thrive in barren wastelands. For them, diplomacy is silence; only steel speaks. Orcs are larger and physically imposing.
orc.debuff_desc: Orcs get slower magic use and mana regeneration.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.history: Miners and blacksmiths in vast underground cities, devoted to Zentheros and Valdor. Dwarves are smaller and stockier.
dwarf.buff_desc: Dwarves gain tougher armor and resistance to poisons.
dwarf.debuff_desc: Dwarves have slower movement and swimming speed.

nightwalker.name: Nightwalker
nightwalker.history: Rare survivors exposed to raw Void energy. Dark ichor flows in their veins, and they are believed blessed by Nocturne.
nightwalker.buff_desc: Nightwalkers move faster at night or in darkness.
nightwalker.debuff_desc: Nightwalkers have reduced health regeneration in sunlight.

beastkin.name: Beastkin
beastkin.history: Half-animal tribes who follow Sylvaris and Halcyon, guided by instinct and tradition.
beastkin.buff_desc: Beastkin jump higher and take reduced fall damage.
beastkin.debuff_desc: Beastkin have lower accuracy with firearms and complex wands.

starborn.name: Starborn
starborn.history: Crystalline beings born from meteors, with glowing energy veins instead of flesh.
starborn.buff_desc: Starborn have a natural shield that regenerates over time when not taking damage.
starborn.debuff_desc: Food and potions are less effective for Starborn.
